narrative:
Precinct Chillicothe 2-A (precinct in Ross County) has 848 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.6 percentage points.
